arts.ttl: Everton icon let rip after Liverpool ended proud derby record - "The f*** were you doing?"
arts.sum: Duncan Ferguson enjoyed a stellar record in the Merseyside derby when he first played for Everton and was fuming when Liverpool eventually got the better of him

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Star forward was 'very close' to leaving in January window for Saudi Pro League
arts.sum: Liverpool were reportedly close to agreeing a deal with a Saudi Pro League side for the sale of one of their forwards in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed another injury boost as Arne Slot drops Everton line-up hint
arts.sum: Arne Slot has confirmed he will make wholesale changes against Everton while one Liverpool star has been passed fit after injury

arts.ttl: David Moyes admits he is 'dreaming' of Europe but concedes there is a 'gulf' in quality between Everton and Liverpool ahead of final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: The Toffees host their neighbours this evening in the last-ever Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park, ahead of their move to the docklands this summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make contact with European club as they look to sign long-term Robertson replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly started working on their squad ahead of the summer transfer window, with a new left-back among main areas under consideration. With Andy Robertson entering his 30s, the club is keen on securing a long-term successor, and one of the names high on their shortlist is Benfica’s Álvaro Carreras, according to Jornal de […] The post Liverpool make contact with European club as they look to sign long-term Robertson replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Not acceptable' - Slot wants Liverpool response in derby
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says the defeat at Plymouth Argyle was "not acceptable" and that his side have to bounce back against Everton in the Merseyside derby on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Liverpool: Kevin Kilbane on why David Moyes can earn famous Premier League win in final Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Former Everton player Kevin Kilbane exclusively tells Sports Mole that he is confident ahead of the Toffees' match against Liverpool on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool join Barcelona & Real Madrid in race for transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona and Real Madrid have been joined in the hunt for a long-rumoured transfer target by Premier League outfit Liverpool. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who point…

arts.ttl: David Moyes confronts Liverpool’s key advantage ‘to start building Everton again’
arts.sum: The Everton boss is keen to bridge the gap to Liverpool on his return to Goodison and the final derby before the Toffees enter a new stadium next season

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals key factor that gives Arsenal hope in title race - and what Liverpool must do in defining period
arts.sum: Liverpool face a run of five Premier League games in 15 days in a run that could prove decisive in the title race
